title: Moderation Update: April 28, 2026
body:
The abuse queue has been triaged. Two high-severity cases were actioned:

- spam_wave_42: Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels.
- toxic_runner: Warned for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers.

One high-severity report against core_maintainer was identified as a false positive and left without action per moderation policy. Three lower-severity reports remain open for review.
